description: Transform the reading log into a progress tracker for a 52-book challenge. Include calculated metrics, conditional formatting, and summary statistics. Save the updated tracker to ~/Documents/reading_tracker.xlsx.

natural_language.prompt: You have a reading log with 18 books read so far this year. Your goal is 52 books (1 per week). Add formulas to track if you're on pace: calculate current week, expected vs actual books, average rating, genre counts, and project your year-end total. Add a progress status column and apply conditional formatting to highlight whether you're on track.
